= 1. Overview =
This document defines the technical specification for the API Gateway service.

= 2. Authentication =
All requests must carry a valid JWT token. Token expiry is set to 3600 seconds.

= 3. Rate Limiting =
Rate limits are enforced per client ID using a token-bucket algorithm.

{{html clean="false"}}
<div id="qf-panel-container"></div>
<div id="qf-popover" style="display:none;position:absolute;z-index:9999;background:#212529;color:#fff;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;" onclick="qfOpenFormWithAnchor()">&#128172; Add Comment</div>
<script>
(function(){
  // Load the sidebar panel
  var path = window.location.pathname;
  var match = path.match(/\/bin\/view\/(.+)/);
  var docRef = match ? decodeURIComponent(match[1]).replace(/\/$/, '') : '';
  if (!docRef.endsWith('WebHome')) docRef = docRef + '.WebHome';
  docRef = docRef.replace(/\//g, '.');
  var returnUrl = window.location.pathname;
  var panelUrl = '/bin/view/QualityFlow/RenderPanel?docRef=' + encodeURIComponent(docRef) + '&returnUrl=' + encodeURIComponent(returnUrl);

  fetch(panelUrl)
    .then(function(r){return r.text();})
    .then(function(html){
      document.getElementById('qf-panel-container').innerHTML = html;
      // After panel loads, inject highlights
      injectHighlights();
    });

  // ── TEXT SELECTION POPOVER ─────────────────────────────────────────
  var popover = document.getElementById('qf-popover');
  var capturedText = '';
  var contentArea = null;

  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function(e) {
    // Wait for content area to be available
    if (!contentArea) contentArea = document.querySelector('.xcontent') || document.querySelector('#xwikicontent') || document.querySelector('.wiki-content') || document.body;
    // Ignore clicks in the sidebar
    if (e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#qf-panel-container')) return;

    setTimeout(function(){
      var sel = window.getSelection();
      var text = sel ? sel.toString().trim() : '';
      if (text.length < 3) { popover.style.display = 'none'; return; }

      capturedText = text.substring(0, 500);
      var rect = sel.getRangeAt(0).getBoundingClientRect();
      popover.style.top = (window.scrollY + rect.bottom + 6) + 'px';
      popover.style.left = (window.scrollX + rect.left) + 'px';
      popover.style.display = 'block';
    }, 10);
  });

  document.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    if (!popover.contains(e.target)) popover.style.display = 'none';
  });

  // Open comment form with anchor text pre-filled
  window.qfOpenFormWithAnchor = function() {
    popover.style.display = 'none';
    var form = document.getElementById('qf-add-comment-form');
    if (form) form.style.display = 'block';
    // Try to find/create a hidden anchorText field
    var anchorInput = form ? form.querySelector('input[name="anchorText"]') : null;
    if (!anchorInput && form) {
      var f = form.querySelector('form');
      anchorInput = document.createElement('input');
      anchorInput.type = 'hidden';
      anchorInput.name = 'anchorText';
      f.appendChild(anchorInput);
    }
    if (anchorInput) anchorInput.value = capturedText;
    // Show anchor preview
    var preview = document.getElementById('qf-anchor-preview');
    if (!preview && form) {
      preview = document.createElement('div');
      preview.id = 'qf-anchor-preview';
      preview.style.cssText = 'background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffda6a;border-radius:4px;padding:6px;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:8px;color:#664d03;';
      form.querySelector('form').insertBefore(preview, form.querySelector('form').firstChild);
    }
    if (preview) {
      preview.innerHTML = '&#9875; Anchored to: <em>"' + capturedText.substring(0,80) + (capturedText.length > 80 ? '...' : '') + '"</em>';
      preview.style.display = 'block';
    }
    window.getSelection().removeAllRanges();
  };

  // ── HIGHLIGHT INJECTION ────────────────────────────────────────────
  function injectHighlights() {
    // Fetch comment data from the holder page to know which texts to highlight
    fetch('/bin/view/QualityFlow/RenderHighlights?docRef=' + encodeURIComponent(docRef))
      .then(function(r){return r.text();})
      .then(function(json){
        try {
          var comments = JSON.parse(json);
          if (!contentArea) contentArea = document.querySelector('.xcontent') || document.querySelector('#xwikicontent') || document.body;
          comments.forEach(function(c){
            if (!c.anchorText || c.anchorText.trim() === '') return;
            var color = c.type === 'Blocker' ? 'rgba(220,53,69,.2)' : (c.type === 'Suggestion' ? 'rgba(13,110,253,.15)' : 'rgba(255,193,7,.25)');
            if (c.status === 'Resolved') color = 'rgba(108,117,125,.15)';
            wrapText(contentArea, c.anchorText, color, c.id);
          });
        } catch(e){}
      }).catch(function(){});
  }

  function wrapText(container, searchText, bgColor, commentId) {
    var walker = document.createTreeWalker(container, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
    var node;
    while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
      var idx = node.nodeValue.indexOf(searchText);
      if (idx === -1) continue;
      var before = node.nodeValue.substring(0, idx);
      var after = node.nodeValue.substring(idx + searchText.length);
      var mark = document.createElement('mark');
      mark.style.cssText = 'background:' + bgColor + ';cursor:pointer;border-radius:2px;padding:0 1px;';
      mark.setAttribute('data-comment-id', commentId);
      mark.textContent = searchText;
      mark.onclick = function(){ var card = document.getElementById('qf-card-' + this.getAttribute('data-comment-id')); if(card) card.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest'}); };
      var parent = node.parentNode;
      if (before) parent.insertBefore(document.createTextNode(before), node);
      parent.insertBefore(mark, node);
      if (after) parent.insertBefore(document.createTextNode(after), node);
      parent.removeChild(node);
      break;
    }
  }
})();
</script>
{{/html}}
